landing.hero.subtitle: Cash does not leave a trail. Štek does. Just say what you spent and it is logged instantly — no forms, no spreadsheets, no guessing. Built for how households in the Balkans actually spend.
landing.features.label: Features
landing.features.title: Built for how your
landing.features.subtitle: Built for the way people actually spend — especially when that spending is in cash.
landing.features.voice_desc: Speak or type naturally in your own language. Say 'coffee 3 KM' and Štek parses it, picks the category, and logs it in seconds. Works whether you are at the market or on the bus.
landing.features.budget_desc: Set monthly limits per category, track your burn rate in real time, and see exactly where money is going before you run out.
landing.features.household_desc: Invite up to 10 family members. Everyone logs their own spending. You all see the combined picture and work toward shared savings goals together.
landing.features.analytics_desc: Monthly comparisons, category breakdowns, daily averages, and income versus expense tracking. All visible at a glance — no spreadsheet needed.
landing.steps.label: How it works
landing.steps.title: Up and running in minutes
landing.steps.step1_desc: Sign up in under a minute with just your email. No credit card needed.
landing.steps.step2_desc: Open the app, tap the mic, and say what you spent. Štek handles the rest.
landing.steps.step3_desc: Set budgets, review insights, and see your financial habits improve over time.
landing.pricing.label: Pricing
landing.pricing.title: One app. Two plans.
landing.pricing.subtitle: Start with a 14-day free trial. Pick your plan when you are ready.
landing.pricing.max_desc: For larger households up to 10 people
landing.pricing.footnote: 14-day free trial included. No credit card required. Cancel anytime. AI-assisted expense parsing is included in your plan and subject to reasonable usage limits and service availability.
landing.testimonials.label: Testimonials
landing.testimonials.title: Loved by households everywhere
landing.testimonials.t1_quote: Štek completely changed how our family handles money. We went from arguments about spending to actually saving for vacations.
landing.testimonials.t2_quote: The voice input is a game-changer. I just say what I spent and it's tracked. Haven't missed an expense in months.
landing.testimonials.t3_quote: Finally an app that gets household finances. My wife and I can both see where our money goes in real time.
landing.security.label: Security
landing.security.title: Your finances are safe with us
landing.security.subtitle: We treat your financial data with the highest level of care and protection.
landing.security.encryption_desc: AES-256 bit encryption protects all your financial data at rest and in transit.
landing.security.privacy_desc: Your data is never sold to third parties. We monetize through subscriptions, not your data.
landing.security.gdpr_desc: Full compliance with EU data protection regulations. Export or delete your data anytime.
landing.security.audit_desc: Regular third-party penetration testing and code reviews keep your account safe.
landing.download.label: Download
landing.download.title: Your finances, everywhere
landing.download.subtitle: Log a coffee from your phone, check the budget on your laptop. Everything stays in sync, always.
landing.cta.subtitle: 14-day free trial. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
landing.cta.footnote: Free forever plan available. No credit card required.
landing.footer.description: Smart household finance management. Track expenses, set budgets, and save together with your family.
about.label: About us
about.subtitle: Most spending in the Balkans happens in cash. We built Štek so your household never has to open a spreadsheet again.
about.quote: Just say what you spent. Štek handles the rest.
about.mission_body: Most banking apps only see what goes through your card. But a huge part of daily spending in the Balkans is cash: at the market, the bakery, the local store. That spending disappears from any app that relies on bank data. Families end up with a rough guess at best, or a broken spreadsheet at worst. We asked ourselves: what if you could just say what you spent and have it tracked instantly? No forms, no categories to pick manually, no Excel. Štek uses AI to understand natural speech and text, log the expense, and keep your household budget accurate in real time.
about.value_1_desc: Speak or type naturally in your own language. 'Coffee 3 KM' is enough. Štek parses it, picks the category, and logs it in seconds.
about.value_2_desc: Every member tracks their own spending. Together you see the full picture: combined totals, category budgets, and shared savings goals.
about.value_3_desc: Bank import does not work for most people in this region. Štek was built from day one for households that pay in cash and still need accurate numbers.
about.cta_subtitle: Try Štek free for 14 days. No credit card required.

contact.headline: How can we help?
contact.subtitle: Have a question, suggestion or issue? Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact.success_body: Thanks for reaching out. We'll reply to your email shortly.
